title: collania dubia
intro: Collania dubia, also known as the "yellowroot," is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow or yellow-green roots and stems with alternate, lance-shaped leaves. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Collania dubia has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Collania dubia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and skin conditions, and support the immune system. Collania dubia can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, with some herbalists also using it in salves or ointments for topical application.
